perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a white tank top talking directly to the camera in a bathroom. Brief shots of a person sleeping, fried foods, and hair strands in palms are interspersed. (2) She demonstrates combing her hair thoroughly with a large black paddle brush. (3) She holds up a green bottle of AROMASE scalp purifying liquid, applies it directly to her scalp, and massages it with her fingertips. (4) She continues massaging her scalp, explaining the importance of cleaning the top area. (5) After a transition, she appears in pink floral pajamas with a white towel on her head and a facial mask on her face. She uses a large towel to dry her hair. (6) She applies a green AROMASE spray to her scalp and rubs it in. (7) Finally, she shows a yellow bottle of Elujuda hair oil, applies it to the ends of her hair, and smiles at the camera as 'Completed' text appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays as a woman speaks in a friendly, informative tone in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The music remains consistent as she explains her hair care routine, with her voice being the dominant sound. (3) The tempo of the background music increases slightly during a montage of her drying her hair. (4) The music and voiceover continue at a steady volume as she demonstrates the final steps, eventually fading out as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken narration throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '頭皮養護小撇步 1：梳頭' (Scalp care tip 1: Combing), '頭皮養護小撇步 2：淨化液' (Scalp care tip 2: Purifying liquid), '頭皮養護小撇步 3：分區清洗' (Scalp care tip 3: Zonal cleaning), '頭皮養護小撇步 4：精華液' (Scalp care tip 4: Essence), '髮油' (Hair oil), and '完成' (Completed) appear at relevant stages.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem identification (hair loss) -> Step-by-step solution tutorial -> Final result demonstration.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female main creator is the only person present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian woman with dark hair, initially wearing a white sleeveless top, then switching to pink pajamas with a facial mask.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern bathroom with light-colored tiles, a mirror, and a bathroom sink area.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a beauty and personal care tutorial where the creator shares her specific hair and scalp care routine to combat hair loss. She provides actionable steps and recommends specific products she uses in her daily life.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator clearly shows product packaging and names the brands AROMASE and Elujuda while demonstrating their use in her routine.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Step-by-step numbering overlays and instructional tone.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends personal vlog elements with a structured product review/tutorial format, typical of influencer marketing on short-form video platforms.
